incidents.title: Production API 502 errors after ECS deploy
incidents.summary: After merging PR #142 (gunicorn bind fix), ECS rolling deploy left 3/4 tasks unhealthy. ALB returned 502 to all users for ~23 minutes.
incidents.customer_impact: All users unable to access dashboard and login for 23 minutes. ~1,200 failed requests/min at peak.

events.author: livingdevops
events.description: Prometheus: http_requests_total{status=502} > 100/min for 3m. PagerDuty page sent to primary on-call.

events.author: devopscaptain
events.description: Status changed to Investigating. Joined war room Slack channel #inc-dev-inc-1.

events.author: devopscaptain
events.description: ECS tasks failing health checks — container logs show connection refused on :8000.

events.author: livingdevops
events.description: Identified root cause: gunicorn binding to 127.0.0.1. Rolling back to previous task definition rev 41.

events.author: devopscaptain
events.description: Rollback complete — 4/4 targets healthy. Error rate back to baseline.

events.author: devopscaptain
events.description: Incident marked resolved. Monitoring for 30 minutes before closing.

postmortem.title: Postmortem: Production API 502 after ECS deploy
postmortem.summary: A Dockerfile change caused gunicorn to bind localhost only. ECS health checks failed, causing a 23-minute outage. Rollback restored service.
postmortem.impact: 23 minutes of full outage. ~28,000 failed requests. No data loss.
postmortem.root_cause: Gunicorn CMD missing --bind 0.0.0.0:8000 in Dockerfile. Worked locally but failed ALB health checks in ECS.
postmortem.contributing_factors: Staging environment uses host networking (masks the bug). No smoke test against ALB after deploy.
postmortem.detection_analysis: Prometheus alert fired within 3 minutes. PagerDuty page was effective. Could add pre-deploy health check in CI.
postmortem.resolution_summary: Rolled back ECS task definition to rev 41. Fixed Dockerfile in follow-up PR with staging ALB verification.
postmortem.what_went_well: Fast rollback via ECS console. Clear war room comms. On-call responded in 2 minutes.
postmortem.what_went_wrong: Staging didn't catch bind issue. No deployment checklist enforced.
postmortem.lessons_learned: Always verify container binds 0.0.0.0 in staging with real ALB. Add deploy smoke test to CI pipeline.

action_items.title: Add ALB health check to staging deploy pipeline
action_items.ticket_title: [PM] Add ALB health check to staging deploy pipeline

action_items.title: Update Dockerfile gunicorn bind and add test

incidents.title: Postgres connection pool exhaustion
incidents.summary: Database connections maxed out during load test. API returning 500 on all DB-backed endpoints.
incidents.customer_impact: Intermittent 500 errors for ~45 minutes during peak load test. No production users affected (staging only).

events.author: devopscaptain
events.description: CloudWatch: DatabaseConnections > 95 for 5m on staging RDS.

events.author: livingdevops
events.description: Investigating connection leak in SQLAlchemy pool config.

events.author: livingdevops
events.description: Reduced pool_size from 50 to 10, added pool_recycle=300. Restarted ECS tasks.

events.author: devopscaptain
events.description: Connection count stable. Load test passes at 2x previous throughput.

incidents.title: CI pipeline blocked — SonarQube quality gate failure
incidents.summary: All PRs failing SonarQube quality gate. Team unable to merge for 4 hours.
incidents.customer_impact: Internal only — no customer impact. Deploy velocity blocked.

events.author: livingdevops
events.description: Incident declared — CI pipeline red on all branches.

events.author: livingdevops
events.description: SonarQube reporting 0% coverage after scanner config change. Investigating sonar-project.properties.
